events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess field condition hi-lo mismatch at weld fit-up for spool erection. Stage tested/inspected. Compare against ASME B31.3 and iso drawings. Hi-lo mismatch beyond allowed tolerance is non-compliant, installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk high? Hi-lo can affect weld integrity, but not imminent collapse; high due to code non-compliance and potential weld failure. Work_stage tested/inspected. Percent complete maybe 85? Value not asked 0. Sound etc default. Findings: excessive hi-lo mismatch at weld fit-up exceeds ASME B31.3 acceptance criteria. Actions: remove/rework spool, realign, re-inspect, re-weld NDE. Rationale. References ASME B31.3 (alignment tolerances), project iso drawings. Need include component_conditions installed-defective and non-compliant maybe. The schema component_conditions list includes installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. Use installed-defective and non-compliant. Confidence 0.95. Ensure valid JSON only.

  "actions": ["Remove or reposition spool to correct alignment", "Re-check hi-lo and gap with qualified inspector", "Re-weld and perform required NDE after correction"],
  "rationale": "ASME B31.3 limits misalignment (hi-lo) at pipe weld fit-up to ensure sound weld root and structural integrity. The observed hi-lo mismatch violates this limit, making the spool non-compliant and defective at the inspection stage.",
  "references": ["ASME B31.3 Process Piping Code alignment/fit-up requirements", "Project iso drawings"]
}
